# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Release or compatibility update

## Compatibility Impact

- Target Vaultic tag/line:
- Minimum PHP version affected:
- Laravel version affected:

## Validation

- [ ] `composer test` executed
- [ ] Manual verification completed
- [ ] No breaking change
- [ ] Breaking change documented

## Checklist

- [ ] Architecture boundaries respected
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] Changelog/release notes updated if needed
